ベッドから起き上がり身体を伸ばす。: I sat up in bed and stretched.
ぶつかってきたものを慌てて受け止める。<br>それはホノカだった。: I hurriedly caught the thing that crashed into me. It was Honoka.
司令官に会いたくて来たんだぞ！ 昨日えっちしたせいか、司令官のこと<br>もっと:
I came 'cause I wanted to see you! I think it's 'cause we did it
yesterday, but now I love you even more! Sex is amazing!
ふがふがふが～～～～♪<br>司令官のにおいがするぞ♪: Sniff, sniff, sniff! I can smell you, Commander!
一方的にまくし立て、さらに顔をこすりつけながら匂いを嗅いでくる。<br>やはり犬:
She rattled on without letting me get a word in, rubbing her face
against me and sniffing. She really was like a dog.
昨日のえっち、すごかったな！<br>なあ、またえっちするか？ もうするか？ 今す:
Yesterday was amazing! Hey, wanna do it again? Right now? How
about now?
いや、朝っぱらからは……: No, first thing in the morning is...
じゃあ昼か？ 夜か？<br>あー、早くまたえっちしたいぞ♪: Then how about noon? Night? Ah, I wanna do it again soon!
すっかりエッチが気に入ってしまったらしい。<br>頬を染めた笑顔に、こちらは思わ:
It seemed she had really taken a liking to sex. Seeing her blushing
smile, I couldn't help but smile wryly.
